title: Custom Waterproof Neoprene Beach Pouch with Carabiner | OEM Cosmetic Bag Manufacturer
seoTitle: Custom Waterproof Neoprene Beach Pouch Manufacturer | OEM Cosmetic Bag Factory
description:
Keep your beach and travel essentials organized with this premium waterproof neoprene beach pouch. Designed for beauty brands, travel companies, promotional businesses, and retailers, this multifunctional pouch combines style, durability, and practicality.

Made from high-quality neoprene, the pouch offers excellent water resistance, flexibility, and cushioning. It is ideal for storing wet swimsuits, bikinis, cosmetics, sunscreen, toiletries, phones, keys, and other personal belongings while protecting them from moisture and sand.

The lightweight design features a smooth zipper closure and a convenient carabiner clip, allowing users to attach it easily to backpacks, beach bags, luggage, or strollers. Its modern appearance and large printable surface also make it an excellent promotional product for custom branding.

As a professional OEM & ODM manufacturer, O'lay Technology Co., Ltd provides complete customization services, including logo printing, custom colors, dimensions, zipper styles, inner lining, packaging, and private label solutions.
seoDescription: Custom waterproof neoprene beach pouch manufacturer offering OEM & ODM cosmetic bags, wet bikini bags and travel pouches with custom logo, colors and packaging. Factory direct supply for global brands and wholesalers.
